en: Well, I'll sell you some of my Adderall if you... No, thanks. I'm off pills.
It's a wise choice. I knew this girl. She had this crazy freak-out because she took too many behavioral meds at once.
ko: 그녀는 약을 너무 많이 한꺼번에 먹고 미친 듯이 날뛰었어.

en: And she just ripped off her clothes and dove into the fountain at Ridgedale Mall and was like,
ko: 그리고 옷을 찢어버리고 리지데일 몰 분수에 뛰어들면서,

en: I am a Kraken from the sea!
I heard that was you. Well, it's good seeing you, Soo Chin.
Your baby probably has a beating heart, you know.
ko: 네 아기 심장은 뛰고 있을 거야, 알지?

en: It can feel pain. And it has fingernails!
Welcome to Women Now, where women are trusted friends.
ko: 여성들이 믿을 수 있는 친구가 되는 '여성 지금'에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

en: Please put your hands where I can see them and surrender any bombs.
